item.title: blog post about setting up blogs
item.author: spriggan
item.description: Step-by-Step Guide to Setting Up My Blog on GitHub Pages 1. Create a Github Account I created a new github account, mainly because I wanted to rebrand my online presence and to have a clear trackable start. While my old git has 1000’s of commits, it’s mainly to internal work projects. 2. Create a New Repository Log into GitHub. Click on the “+” icon in the top right corner and select “New repository”.

item.title: hello moon
item.author: spriggan
item.description: Trying something new. Documenting what I do.
